message:
feat(search): simplify two-tier search with unified fallback path

Remove async/await from frankensearch probe and consolidate search
phase selection logic. Use a single deterministic fallback to
fast-tier search when progressive paths are unavailable, improving
clarity and reducing branching. Add comprehensive debug logging
for phase selection decisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
